title: aspalathus collina
intro: Aspalathus collina, also known as the rocky mountain tea, is a succulent plant native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aspalathus collina include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Aspalathus collina can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which is a popular way to harness its medicinal properties.
